---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new rule kind, CLI flag, preset, or behavior
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What use case or pain point motivates the feature? Concrete example preferred.

## Proposed behavior

What should `cldc` do? Include:
- New CLI surface (flags, subcommands)
- New policy surface (rule kinds, evidence types, presets)
- Schema changes (lockfile, check report, fix plan)

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you rejected and why.

## Compatibility

- Backwards compatible? Yes / No
- Requires a new `format_version` or `$schema` URI? Yes / No
- Requires an RFC update in `docs/rfcs/`? Yes / No

## Willing to implement

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, requesting help
